name: Your value is determined by the size of your cock
description:

From 10 to 12 inches: between ten and twelve inches, this is the prime alpha class. They have jobs as bosses or politicians. They can use any women they want except those of alphas and gods. They are untouchable; a man who insults or assaults a god is castrated and sent to a re-education center for two years, and a woman who refuses to obey them or who offends them is turned into a prostitute, tied up naked in the street for all to use.
